Bone.description: Useful for crafting basic tools and weapons.
Bone.flavorText: One of the oldest crafting materials known to humanity, available on Icarus thanks to the last-minute genetic redesigns of Earth-native animals, which now thrive in the terrazone.

Bone_Knife.description: Stronger, lighter and sharper than its stone cousin.
Bone_Knife.flavorText: Did any UDA xenobiologist ever foresee that the bones of animals they adapted for life on Icarus would one day be used to fashion rudimentary hunting weapons?

Bone_Spear.description: A bone blade improves melee damage.
Bone_Spear.flavorText: As most new arrivals on Icarus realise at some stage, there is a certain elegance to hunting an animal for its bones, in order to craft a more effective weapon to hunt further animals.

Bone_Arrow.description: A primitive arrow, dealing greater damage than stone.
Bone_Arrow.flavorText: In the mid-22nd century, the fletchers art is being rediscovered on Icarus.

Kit_Generator.description: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
Kit_Generator.flavorText: Literally or figuratively, we\'ve come a long way from the Faraday Disc.

Composter.description: Rapidly decomposes organic matter into biofuel, which is collected by adding a biofuel can. Can be connected to a water network for increased processing speed.
Composter.flavorText: Requires a fuel can to be added to collect biofuel.

Bed_Bedroll.description: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.
Bed_Bedroll.flavorText: \'A bed is where the soul returns after a night\'s travelling\' ~ Russian folk saying

Food_Bread.description: Wholesome, filling and slow to spoil.

Dough_Bread.description: Makes bread, just add to a fire.

Beer.description: Proving you can brew beer from just about anything.
Beer.flavorText: Warms the body, soothes the soul, increases regeneration rates.

Jerrycan.description: Canister for biofuel storage, which can be filled at a composter.

Brazier.description: An easily crafted, open source of light.

Metal_Oxite_Dissolver.description: A faster and more efficient, biofuel-powered oxidizer with greater storage.

Jerrycan_Full.description: Canister for biofuel storage, which can be filled at a composter.

Bandage_Basic.description: Cloth bandages to stem bleeding and heal minor wounds.
Bandage_Basic.flavorText: The healing won\'t start until the bleeding stops.

Rug_AlphaWolf.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Bear.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Buffalo.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Bear_Trophy.flavorText: Until you step beyond the terrazone, few totems of survival speak louder than a grizzly\'s silent head.

Bear_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Bear.
Bear_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Jaguar_Black_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Black Jaguar.
Jaguar_Black_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Debug_Target.description: Useful for crafting basic tools and weapons.
Debug_Target.flavorText: One of the oldest crafting materials known to humanity, available on Icarus thanks to the last-minute genetic redesigns of Earth-native animals, which now thrive in the terrazone.

Rifle_BoltAction.description: A single-shot bolt action, packs a punch.
Rifle_BoltAction.flavorText: Despite limited metallurgic and gunsmithing resources, First Cohort prospectors have managed to design a better-than-serviceable, true-aiming hunting rifle.

Kitchen_Stove.flavorText: A well-crafted, solidly insulated stove for discerning off-world chefs.

Bone_Sickle.flavorText: The falk or grasshook is a harvesting tool of old, a symbol of labor, and weapon of disgruntled serfdom.

Glass_Jar_Jam.flavorText: It\'s not just jam. You hold in your hand an irreducible symbol of humanity\'s commitment to settling an alien world. Strongly increases max stamina.

Bio_Needle.description: Terraforming tool or catastrophic bio-weapon, you decide.
Bio_Needle.flavorText: Responsible for the so-called \'genocide\' of Icarus\'s native life in the terrazone, each \'warhead\' contains sufficient enzymatic material to \'adjust\' a trillion tons of atmosphere. Handle with care.

Blood_Thinning_Paste.description: A folk remedy for diminishing the effects of concussions and contusions.

Blood_Thinning_Tonic.description: An effective remedy for relieving concussions and contusions.
Blood_Thinning_Tonic.flavorText: Voyagers to Icarus have found themselves forced to ressurect a range of folk treatments and traditional medicines.

Blood_Thinning_Pill.description: A potent preventative for concussions and contusions.
Blood_Thinning_Pill.flavorText: Off-label and off-planet, this one doesn\'t come with any warnings. So it\'s probably safe.

Faction_Mission_Drill.description: A portable, heavy duty boring rig powered by biofuel.
Faction_Mission_Drill.flavorText: Driven by bio-diesel, this micro-derrick design was adapted from asteroid mining equipment used in the early 22nd century.

Cooked_Carrot.flavorText: Boosts stamina slightly, may prompt angst.

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Provides temporary immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Beta.description: Provides temporary immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Provides extended immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Alpha.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Beta.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Charlie.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Basic_Wall_Light.description: A wall-mounted lamp, providing wide illumination, needing power.

Basic_Ceiling_Light.description: A bunker-style lamp, providing wide illumination, needing power.
Basic_Ceiling_Light.flavorText: "We forgive children who are afraid of the dark. The tragedy is adults afraid of the light." - Plato

Deep_Mining_Drill_Biofuel.description: A biofuel-powered drill capable of mining ore trapped deep under the surface.
Deep_Mining_Drill_Biofuel.flavorText: Slow progress, but it\'s worth it

Buffalo_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Buffalo.
Buffalo_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Buffalo_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Meta_Berry_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Berry Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Bean_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Bean Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Basic_Fertilizer.description: Provides a small bonus to growth speed and crop yield
Basic_Fertilizer.flavorText: A simple way to increase your harvest

Mission_Broken_Solar_Panel.description: Could be repaired with a bit of patience
Mission_Broken_Solar_Panel.flavorText: A lot of simple devices can be repaired on Icarus

Radar_Biofuel.description: A portable Exotics detection unit powered by Biofuel. Approximate directional arc shown on your map. Attracts animals while active.
Radar_Biofuel.flavorText: Powered by good old Icarus Biofuel.

Extractor_Biofuel.description: A portable mining unit powered by Biofuel, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Biofuel.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Mission_Broken_Prototype_Laser.description: Broken prototype laser, it could be repaired at a crafting bench.
Mission_Broken_Prototype_Laser.flavorText: Once a cutting edge prototype, now a pile of scrap.

Saddle_Mount.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable
Saddle_Mount.flavorText: Feel the wind in your hair.

Mission_Power_Source.description: A state of the art Power Cell for a Biological Containment Unit.
Mission_Power_Source.flavorText: This is making a very weird humming noise.

Black_Wolf_Knife.description: A knife made from the teeth of an intimidating predator.

Black_Wolf_Arrow.description: An arrow made from the teeth of an intimidating predator.

Black_Wolf_Tooth.description: A razor sharp canine pulled from the mouth of a beast.
Black_Wolf_Tooth.flavorText: Handle with care, or lose a finger.

Tool_Attachment_Bleed.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Bleed on hit creatures.
Tool_Attachment_Bleed.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Bullseye_Target.description: Can be used to test out Ranged Damage Per Second.
Bullseye_Target.flavorText: A Bullseye made out of locally sourced materials.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_ADS_Upgrade_1.description: An attachment that increases your aiming speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_ADS_Upgrade_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, rifle, shotgun, bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Increased_Sprea.description: An attachment that increases the spread of your shots.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Increased_Sprea.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid shotgun.

Saddle_Bag_Mount.description: Place this harness inside a tamed Buffalo or Tusker\'s inventory to increase it\'s carrying capacity. This harness cannot be used as a seat by players.
Saddle_Bag_Mount.flavorText: Lending a helping hand, or hoof.

Bone_Throwing_Knife.description: Stronger, lighter and sharper than its stone cousin.
Bone_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Did any UDA xenobiologist ever foresee that the bones of animals they adapted for life on Icarus would one day be used to fashion rudimentary hunting weapons?

Black_Wolf_Throwing_Knife.description: A knife made from the teeth of an intimidating predator.

Bone_Throwing_Spear.description: A bone blade improves ranged damage.
Bone_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: As most new arrivals on Icarus realise at some stage, there is a certain elegance to hunting an animal for its bones, in order to craft a more effective weapon to hunt further animals.

Basic_Fishing_Trap.description: A simple trap that can catch Basic Low Quality Fish

Fishing_Bench.description: A place to craft Rods and Lures and to fillet Fish that you\'ve caught.

Fish_02_Var2.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_02_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_08_Var4.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_08_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_11.description: A rare saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_11.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_14.description: A rare freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_14.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_14_Var3.description: A rare freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_14_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_17_Var3.description: Unique to the Prometheus region, these fish can only be found in the Sulfur Pools of Volcanic areas.
Fish_17_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Bone_Lure.description: A lightweight lure carefully crafted out of bone, to attract more fish.
Bone_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Black_Wolf_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of the remains of a Black Wolf.
Black_Wolf_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Bark_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted from bark, to attract more fish.
Bark_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Blue_Reed_Lure.description: A delicate lure carefully crafted from flowers, to attract more fish.
Blue_Reed_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Cooked_Kumara.description: This meal has a caramelized exterior and soft and fluffy interior.
Cooked_Kumara.flavorText: Tastier than a staple food but just as easy.

Alpha_Sandworm_Statue_Bronze.description: A Sandworm in all its bronzed glory.
Alpha_Sandworm_Statue_Bronze.flavorText: It doesn\'t look too tough, at this size...

Shield_Bone.description: This gruesome shield is a formidable barrier that will strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.
Shield_Bone.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Bone_Head.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Head.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Chest.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Chest.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Feet.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Feet.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Arms.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Arms.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Legs.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Legs.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

AlienFossil_Pottery.description: An oddly-marked clay vessel, that has been damaged by something.

Meta_Creature_Scanner.description: Bio-Entity Analysis and Scanning Technology. A handheld device that scans nearby creatures for analysis and locates weaknesses.
Meta_Creature_Scanner.flavorText: A beauty of a device that will make surviving Icarus that much easier.

Berry_Bar.description: Full of energy for long hikes.
Berry_Bar.flavorText: Tastes much better than seed crackers.

Brownbear_Head.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brownbear_Chest.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brownbear_Arms.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brownbear_Legs.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brownbear_Feet.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Medic_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to cover all your medical needs.

Blueback_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Blueback.
Blueback_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Blueback_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Black_Fur.description: A patch of fur taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Water_Purifier_T1_Water.description: A simple water purifier that can be placed into a body of water to create filtered water.

Water_Purifier_T1_Ground.description: A simple water purifier that collects and purifies rainwater.

Brutalist_Dining_Table_Round.description: A robust table crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Dining_Table_Round.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Dining_Table_6.description: A robust table crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Dining_Table_6.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Dining_Table_10.description: A robust table crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Dining_Table_10.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Dining_Chair.description: A robust chair crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Dining_Chair.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Living_Chair.description: A robust chair crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Living_Chair.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Living_Couch_2.description: A robust couch crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Living_Couch_2.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Living_Couch_3.description: A robust couch crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Living_Couch_3.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Bench_Sitting.description: A robust bench crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Bench_Sitting.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Shelf_Wall.description: A robust shelf crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Shelf_Wall.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Cabinet.description: A robust cabinet crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Cabinet.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Wardrobe.description: A robust wardrobe crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Wardrobe.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Candles.description: A robust candlestick crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Candles.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Dresser.description: A robust dresser crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Dresser.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Stool.description: A robust stool crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Stool.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Nightstand.description: A robust nightstand crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Nightstand.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Bed.description: A robust bed crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Bed.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Bookshelf.description: A robust bookshelf crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Bookshelf.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Lamp.description: A robust lamp crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Lamp.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_Lamp_Square.description: A robust lamp crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Lamp_Square.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Brutalist_CoffeeTable.description: A robust table crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_CoffeeTable.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

T3_Cleaning_Device.description: Cleans Volatile Exotics and processes select boss material into biomass for use in the orbital Biolab.
T3_Cleaning_Device.flavorText: Keep all hands and feet clear when in use.

Black_Wolf_Shield.description: An impressive shield crafted from the spoils of defeating a Black Wolf
Black_Wolf_Shield.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

AlphaWolf_Attachment_Melee.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Wound and Deep Wound on hit creatures.
AlphaWolf_Attachment_Melee.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Beehive.description: A beehive that can be used to start your beekeeping journey.
Beehive.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Beehive_Extractor.description: An extractor that attaches to a beehive that can process Honeycomb into Honey and Beeswax.
Beehive_Extractor.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Beehive_BreedingCenter.description: A Breeding Center that attaches to a beehive that provides the facilities for a Queen Bee to produce Worker Bees.
Beehive_BreedingCenter.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Beeswax.description: Freshly processed Beeswax, ready for use.
Beeswax.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Battery_Shelf_T3.description: A rack of batteries that can supply power to your network.

Black_Wolf_Head.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Head.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Chest.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Chest.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Feet.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Feet.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Arms.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Arms.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Legs.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Legs.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Smoked_Saltwater_Fillet.description: A flavorful snack made by smoking and preserving tender fillets of saltwater fish.
Smoked_Saltwater_Fillet.flavorText: Fishy but with a hint of sweet taste.

Dried_Meat_Generic.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Saddle_Bearhide.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount made from the hide of those pesky Bears.

Biofuel_Water_Pump.description: A small, but powerful axial-flow pump useful for creating water networks.

Meta_Bramble_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Bramble Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Bramble.description: Can be deployed, but not picked up
Bramble.flavorText: Will hurt you if you get too close

Chicken_Head_A2.description: A preserved memory of a feathered friend.
Chicken_Head_A2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Animal_Bed_Burlap.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Burlap.flavorText: Can\'t go wrong with a burlap sack

Animal_Bed_Tusker.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Tusker.flavorText: A rough but mostly comfortable bed.

Big_Breakfast.description: Fried meat, eggs, tomatoes and potatoes!
Big_Breakfast.flavorText: You can never go wrong with a big breakfast...

Horse_Head_A1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Horse_Head_A1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Horse_Head_A2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Horse_Head_A2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cat_Head_A3.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Cat_Head_A3.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cat_Trophy_A3.description: A preserved memory of your feline friend.

Dog_Head_D2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_D2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Butchery_Bench.description: A modular workspace for working with all kinds of meat products.
Butchery_Bench.flavorText: Be careful, the knives are sharp.

Dog_Trophy_D2_1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_D2_2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Black_Wolf_Trophy_Sit.description: A preserved Black Wolf, that once lived on Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Trophy_Sit.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Black_Wolf_Trap.description: A trap that snap\'s shut to damage creatures that walk within range.

Black_Wolf_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Black Wolf Creature.

LegendaryWeapon_ApeClub.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Club created via studying of the Garganutan.
LegendaryWeapon_ApeClub.flavorText: An Ape Club? Real original, Norex

Battery_Lantern.description: A robust, portable battery-powered lamp. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.

CaveLight.description: Provides a temporary light for cave exploration for marking a path. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.

CaveSpotLight.description: Provides a strong temporary light for keeping things lit at night. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.

Bunker_Bunk_Bed.description: Good for saving space and providing an adequate sleep environment.
Bunker_Bunk_Bed.flavorText: You can feel like a kid again.

Bunker_Base_Sign.description: An old sign for a defunct base.
Bunker_Base_Sign.flavorText: It triggers reminders of road signs on Earth.

ReinforcedWood_Floor.description: Rugged timber flooring, treated with a coating of beeswax for reinforcement.

ReinforcedWood_Wall.description: A wall of treated wooden logging.

ReinforcedWood_Wall_Angle.description: Treated angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

ReinforcedWood_Ramp.description: A basic wooden ramp or roof, coated in beeswax to protect it from the elements.
ReinforcedWood_Ramp.flavorText: May still be susceptable to the great storms of Icarus.

ReinforcedWood_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
ReinforcedWood_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

ReinforcedWood_Roof_Corner.description: A roughly cut and coated insert for angled roofs.

ReinforcedWood_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
ReinforcedWood_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

FieldGuide_Biofuel.description: Biofuel is used in a variety of equipment.

Bull_Head.description: The remains of a mighty bull.
Bull_Head.flavorText: Even in death it is majestic.

Bull_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Bacon_Sandwhich.flavorText: Bacon in Bread, whats not to love.

ResearchEquipment_Centrifuge.flavorText: Still functional but has seen better days.

ResearchEquipment_Flasks.flavorText: A simple device, still running after many hours of research.

ResearchEquipment_Microscope.flavorText: Expensive to replace on Earth, even more expensive on Icarus.

ResearchEquipment_TestTubes.flavorText: Collected many samples during their time.

ResearchEquipment_LabDesk.description: A simple Laboratory Desk brought from Orbit.
ResearchEquipment_LabDesk.flavorText: Easier to craft on Icarus these days.

Homestead_BarnDoor.description: A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.

Lab_Stool.description: A basic metal stool, a little worse for wear.

Homestead_Barbed_Wire_Fence.description: A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.

Enemy_Turret_Pistol.description: A turret that fires on anyone not registered to the system, fires pistol ammo.
Enemy_Turret_Pistol.flavorText: This design is marked as "experimental" by the Lagos Group - The UDA is not liable for any injuries caused by this unit.

Gas_Fireplace.description: A biofuel powered fireplace, suitable for both basic cooking and heating.
Gas_Fireplace.flavorText: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

Gas_Fireplace_Ext.description: Wide metal tubing helps the smoke escape the hearth.
Gas_Fireplace_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Gas_Fireplace_Cap.description: Vents and extractor fans help clear up any smoke from your shoddily cooked meals.

Mission_Biotag.description: A small device which monitors biometrics of the creature it is implanted into.

Prop_Burlap_Sack.description: A Simple Burlap Sack. Anything could be inside.

Meta_Banana_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Banana Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Mission_Biochip_A.description: A small device which monitors biometrics of the creature it is implanted into.

Mission_Biochip_B.description: A small device which monitors biometrics of the creature it is implanted into.

Mission_Biochip_C.description: A small device which monitors biometrics of the creature it is implanted into.

Prop_Boardgame.description: Something to pass the time on Icarus.
Prop_Boardgame.flavorText: Immerse yourself in a game for a few hours and forget about everything trying to kill you outside.

Prop_Book.description: Something to pass the time on Icarus.

Prop_Bookstack.flavorText: Immerse yourself in a game for a few hours and forget about everything trying to kill you outside.

Mission_Burner.description: A simple tool for heating solutions.
Mission_Burner.flavorText: Wouldn\'t find a chemistry lab without one of these.

Fertility_Serum_Cow.description: Primes Bulls for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Cows.

Fertility_Serum_Buffalo.description: Primes Male Buffalo for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Female Buffalo.

Workshop_Beehive_Starter_Kit.description: A basic kit which allows the starting up of a beehive, including Queen Bees, Bees and Honeycomb.
